arts.ttl: Man City transfer could scupper Arsenal chances of landing long-term target
arts.sum: Manchester City's rumoured interest in Newcastle United midfielder Bruno Guimaraes could scupper Arsenal's chances of landing long-term target Alexander Isak. From an Arsenal perspective, the concern centres around Newcastle potentially settling any future PSR fears with a sale of Guimaraes, which would take away any need to part ways with Isak.

arts.ttl: Is Gabriel fit to start for Arsenal vs Everton? Injury latest and FPL update
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has surprisingly been very open on Gabriel's injury recovery before Everton which will please Fantasy Premier League managers. Despite the fact William Saliba was on target twice in the two games Gabriel missed, he is still five points behind his centre-back partner.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta gives Gabriel Magalhaes injury update and two more ahead of Arsenal vs Everton
arts.sum: The trio are major doubts heading into Saturday's clash with Everton, although Arteta admitted Gabriel has a chance of being available. Mikel Arteta has provided the latest on the fitness of his Arsenal squad ahead of their Premier League clash with Everton at Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: 'Might have been nice': Arsenal snub leaves midfielder with regrets as he moves to Indonesia aged 25
Arsenal looking to extend all-time English football winning record in Everton Premier League clash
arts.sum: Arsenal will have the opportunity to extend an all-time winning English football record when they welcome Everton to the Emirates Stadium for Saturday's Premier League meeting with Everton.

arts.ttl: Club have now spoken to Arsenal man’s entourage about January – Gunners still need convincing
arts.sum: Napoli have now spoken to Arsenal defender Jakub Kiwior’s entourage about a move in the January transfer window but have work to do to convince the Gunners. That’s according to Tuttomercatoweb, who report that Napoli have held a ‘discussion’ with Kiwior’s entourage about a move. arts.ttl: Arsenal: Thomas Tuchel confirms plans to speak to Ben White about England U-turn
arts.sum: Gunners defender has not been called up to Three Lions in two years

arts.ttl: Dan Ashworth is perfect fit for Arsenal ... and not because he is Richard Garlick's mate
arts.sum: The sporting director’s reputation is unaffected by his shock Manchester United exit

arts.ttl: Thomas Tuchel to offer ‘clean start’ to Ben White and other exiled England stars
arts.sum: White has not played for his country since leaving England’s World Cup camp two years ago - as Tuchel offered a clean slate

arts.ttl: Arsenal receive injury boost as Gabriel Magalhaes returns to training ahead of clash with Everton
arts.sum: Arsenal have received a boost on the fitness front, with a key player in Mikel Arteta's squad returning to training ahead of Saturday's game at home to Everton.
